code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut sum = 0
mut count = 0
mut cur = 0
mut sign = 1
mut in_num = false
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
      if in_num
        sum = sum + sign * cur
        count = count + 1
        cur = 0
        sign = 1
        in_num = false
      end
    else if b == 45
      sign = -1
      in_num = true
    else if b == 43
      in_num = true
    else
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      in_num = true
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if in_num
  sum = sum + sign * cur
  count = count + 1
end
let avg = sum / count
println("avg=#{avg}")
